nasb.text: And He went into their synagogues throughout all Galilee, preaching and casting out the demons.

esv.text: And he went throughout all Galilee, preaching in their synagogues and casting out demons.

cnv.text: 於是他走遍加利利全地，在他們的會堂裡傳道，並且趕鬼。

ccb.text: 于是，耶稣走遍加利利，在各会堂传道，赶鬼。

csbs.text: 于是耶稣在全加利利往来，在他们的会堂里传道，并且驱赶鬼魔。
